description: Vault-Tec Industries – Fallout-universe parody pharma/chem manufacturing. Products: StimPak, RadAway, Nuka-Cola Quantum, Jet, Buffout. BG-level template covering full ISA-95 + S88 hierarchy.

tree.name: Vault-Tec_Industries
tree.description: Vault-Tec Industries – Pre-War pharmaceutical and chemical conglomerate. Est. 2052.

children.name: Vault-Tec
children.description: Core manufacturing division – controlled substances, rad-treatments, and soft drinks.

children.name: nuka-boston-facility-01
children.description: Nuka-Cola production facility (dedicated). Former Nuka-World adjacent compound, Boston Commonwealth sector.

children.name: nuka-cola-bottling
children.description: Nuka-Cola and Nuka-Cola Quantum bottling lines. Quantum variant contains trace Strontium-90 for bioluminescent glow effect.

children.name: syrup-preparation
children.description: High-fructose corn syrup + flavour compound blending. Quantum additive dosing.

children.name: syrup-blending-01
children.description: Syrup blend tank with Quantum isotope dosing module.

tags.name: nuka-quantum-glow-index
tags.description: Nuka Quantum glow index – bioluminescence intensity [nGI]. Spec 8–12 nGI. (fictional unit)

tags.name: strontium-dose-rate
tags.description: Sr-90 dosing rate for Quantum variant [µg/L]. (fictional / parody).

children.name: bottle-filling-line
children.description: Glass bottle rinse, fill, crown-cap, and label application.

children.name: bottle-filler-01
children.description: isobaric 48-head bottle filler.

tags.name: fill-level
tags.description: Mean fill volume per bottle [mL]. Nominal 355 mL.
